title: Simply Go Mini
description: Light weight and Easy to Transport Oxygen Purity Indicator 3 Years Warranty Provides a continuous flow Budget-friendly Low maintenance for reduced service cost
longDescription:
SimplyGo Mini


The SimplyGo Mini is one of the lightest and most compact portable oxygen concentrators in its class, designed to support active, on-the-go lifestyles.


Key Highlights


  • Ultra-Lightweight & Compact Design
  • Weighs approximately 2.3 kg (5 lbs) with the standard battery, and around 2.7 kg (6 lbs) with the extended battery Its dimensions are about 9.4" × 8.3" × 3.6" (~23.9 × 21.1 × 9.1 cm)
  • Pulse-Dose Oxygen Delivery (Settings 1–5)
  • Delivers oxygen in pulses aligned with your breathing.
  • Flow outputs range from ≈220 ml/min (Setting 1) to ≈1,000 ml/min (Setting 5), with oxygen purity levels between 87% and 96%
  • Impressive Battery Life
  • Standard battery: ~4.5 hours (Setting 2) up to ~6 hours (Setting 1)
  • Extended battery: Up to ~9 hours (Setting 2) and up to ~12 hours (Setting 1)
  • FAA, FDA, and CE Approved
  • Fully certified for use aboard aircraft, meeting US and international regulatory standards
  • Durable & Travel-Ready
  • Built for rugged use tested against vibrations, drops, and extreme temperatures. Features a stylish carry case, intuitive touch-screen, and an easily swappable external battery
  • Safety First: Alarms Included
  • Alerts include low battery, power loss, system malfunction, no flow, and low oxygen purity alarms, ensuring peace of mind

specifications.value: ~2.3 kg (5 lbs) standard / ~2.7 kg (6 lbs) extended
